media.title: Heat close out summer league with victory over Pistons, as ex-‘Cane Donaldson fill box score
media.description: During a month to remember for the Miami Heat, one highlighted by Thursday’s welcoming of Giannis Antetokounmpo, summer league was destined to take a back seat.

items.body_excerpt: Donaldson delivering Hurricanes grit to summer Heat, "My football side shows, for sure." www.sun-sentinel.com/2026/07/07/d... Wayne Ellington, "He causes havoc. He has a knack for the ball."

media.title: Donaldson delivering Hurricanes grit to summer Heat, ‘ My football side shows, for sure’
media.description: You can see it on offense, the ability to probe, a quarterback on that end. You can see it on defense, roaming like a safety, ready to create a turnover. Tre Donaldson says it’s all innate.

media.title: Last stop Hurricanes, next stop Heat for well-schooled Donaldson at summer league
media.description: The learning curve can be unforgiving for undrafted NBA prospects, Or you could arrive as a veteran, a well-schooled collegiate veteran, like Tre Donaldson with the Miami Heat.

items.title: Undrafted Miami guard Tre Donaldson has agreed to a two-way NBA deal with the Miami Heat, sources tell ESPN.
items.author: Shams Charania Tweets
